puzzle.hint: Closer to you than this life-giving vessel.
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
puzzle.verse: 50:16 — And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.
